title: Delicate German Bao Dessert
description: A unique Indian-inspired dessert combining delicate flavors of German almond cake and soft bao.
instructions: Slice the German almond cake into 1-inch thick slices.
Wrap each slice in a piece of bao, creating a small pouch.
In a small saucepan, warm the almond milk over low heat.
Add honey, ghee, and cardamom powder to the almond milk. Whisk until dissolved.
Dip each bao-wrapped cake slice into the warm almond milk mixture, coating lightly.
Place the coated cake slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 5-7 minutes or until the bao is lightly toasted.
Serve warm with fresh berries, if desired.
Garnish with a sprinkle of cardamom powder, if desired.
